name: Remotek Corporation
summary: Remotek Corporation engages in the research, design, production, and sale of radio coverage solutions for 2G, 3G, and 4G mobile radio networks worldwide. The company offers digital repeaters, including PICO ICS, ICS, digital fiber optic, and digital band adjustable repeaters; distributed antenna systems, such as fiber optic repeaters and cable boosters; and off air solutions comprising low and medium power repeaters, high power repeaters, channel selective repeaters, and frequency shifting repeaters. It also provides operation and maintenance system, a management system for controlling and monitoring repeaters remotely; and accessories, such as antennas, couplers, splitters, combiners, dummy loads, coaxial cables, and connectors. In addition, the company offers RF components and related services. It serves providers of mobile communication. Remotek Corporation was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
